assertions.name: no-3-col-equal-cards
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses `grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr)` (exact anti-pattern)
assertions.with_skill: PASS — uses asymmetric `2fr 1fr 1fr` grid with explicit rejection of equal cards

assertions.name: no-ai-color-palette
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses `#06b6d4` (cyan) and `#8b5cf6` (purple) on dark, the exact banned palette
assertions.with_skill: PASS — explicitly rejects cyan/purple, uses warm earth tone accent oklch(65% 0.15 45)

assertions.name: no-gradient-text-or-accent
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — gradient accent bars AND gradient text on every metric number
assertions.with_skill: PASS — explicitly states 'No gradients anywhere', uses weight and color for hierarchy

assertions.name: no-hero-metric-layout
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — exact template: big number + small label + gradient accent on every card
assertions.with_skill: PASS — adds contextual data (trend %, time range) instead of bare number+label

assertions.name: no-pure-black-bg
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses `background: #000`
assertions.with_skill: PASS — uses zinc-950 `#09090b` with explicit note

assertions.name: distinctive-font-choice
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses `Inter, sans-serif` (explicitly banned)
assertions.with_skill: PASS — uses `Geist` with explanation

assertions.name: oklch-color-space
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — all colors in hex (#eff6ff, etc.), no mention of OKLCH
assertions.with_skill: PASS — entire palette defined in oklch() with explicit rationale

assertions.name: tinted-neutrals
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — pure untinted greys (#f9fafb, #6b7280, etc.), no brand hue tinting
assertions.with_skill: PASS — all greys tinted at hue 250 with 0.005-0.02 chroma

assertions.name: no-pure-black-white
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses `#000000` for bg-dark and text-primary, `#ffffff` for bg-primary
assertions.with_skill: PASS — darkest is oklch(13% ...), lightest is oklch(98.5% ...), both tinted

assertions.name: 60-30-10-rule
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — mentions the ratio but doesn't structure the palette around it
assertions.with_skill: PASS — explicit usage guide mapping neutrals=60%, primary=30%, accent=10%

assertions.name: semantic-token-naming
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses flat naming (--primary-50, --grey-50) not semantic pattern
assertions.with_skill: PASS — uses {category}-{property}-{variant} pattern: --color-surface-base, --color-text-primary, --color-status-success-bg

assertions.name: dark-mode-strategy
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — dark mode just swaps to #000 bg with #fff text, no depth/desaturation strategy
assertions.with_skill: PASS — lighter surfaces for depth (raised > base), desaturated primary (chroma 0.18→0.14), explicit notes

assertions.name: layered-shadows
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — single shadow per level (e.g., `0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)`)
assertions.with_skill: PASS — 2-3 layers per level with increasing blur and decreasing opacity

assertions.name: no-pure-black-shadows
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — all shadows use `rgba(0, 0, 0, ...)` (pure black)
assertions.with_skill: PASS — all shadows use `rgba(17, 24, 39, ...)` (deep navy tint)

assertions.name: shadow-tokens-scale
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses Tailwind-style naming (--shadow-sm/md/lg) not semantic scale
assertions.with_skill: PASS — uses --shadow-1 through --shadow-4 with explicit element mapping

assertions.name: animate-via-pseudo
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses `transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease` directly
assertions.with_skill: PASS — full pseudo-element technique with ::after, opacity transition, pointer-events: none

assertions.name: consistent-light-source
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — no mention of light source direction
assertions.with_skill: PASS — explicitly states top light source, all shadows cast downward

assertions.name: concentric-radius
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — no mention of concentric radius
assertions.with_skill: PASS — full code example with outer = inner + padding formula

assertions.name: label-above-input
assertions.without_skill: PASS — labels are above inputs
assertions.with_skill: PASS — labels display:block above inputs, errors below

assertions.name: correct-input-types
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — email uses type='text' instead of type='email', no inputmode or autocomplete
assertions.with_skill: PASS — type='email', inputmode='email', autocomplete='email/name/new-password' on each input

assertions.name: no-paste-blocking
assertions.without_skill: PASS — no paste blocking present (but not explicitly addressed)
assertions.with_skill: PASS — explicitly notes 'no onPaste handler anywhere'

assertions.name: button-for-actions
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses `<div onclick='handleSubmit()'>` instead of `<button>`
assertions.with_skill: PASS — uses `<button type='submit'>`, explicitly notes 'never <div onClick>'

assertions.name: verb-noun-buttons
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — button says 'Submit' (generic verb, no noun)
assertions.with_skill: PASS — button says 'Create Account' (verb + noun)

assertions.name: inline-errors-focus
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses alert() for errors, no inline display, no focus management
assertions.with_skill:
PASS — inline error

elements below fields, firstError.focus() on submit

assertions.name: error-messages-include-fix
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — terse messages like 'Email is required', no guidance on how to fix
assertions.with_skill: PASS — each error includes fix: 'Check for a missing @ or domain (e.g., you@company.com)'

assertions.name: touch-targets-44px
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — inputs use padding: 8px (~32px height), button has padding: 10px 20px (~36px)
assertions.with_skill: PASS — all inputs and button have min-height: 44px

assertions.name: what-will-be-here
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — 'No tasks yet' is negation, doesn't describe what WILL be here
assertions.with_skill: PASS — 'Your tasks live here' clearly states what the space is for

assertions.name: why-it-matters
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — no value proposition, just slop copy about 'unleashing productivity'
assertions.with_skill: PASS — 'Track what needs doing, assign deadlines, see progress across your whole project'

assertions.name: how-to-get-started
assertions.without_skill: PASS — has an 'Add Task' button
assertions.with_skill: PASS — 'Create your first task' button + keyboard shortcut hint

assertions.name: visual-interest
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses a clipboard emoji, not a custom illustration
assertions.with_skill: PASS — custom SVG illustration with task-list motif (stacked bars + add circle)

assertions.name: no-ai-slop-copy
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses 'unleash', 'seamless', 'elevate', 'next level' (4 banned words)
assertions.with_skill: PASS — zero banned words, concrete language throughout

assertions.name: no-generic-loading-copy
assertions.without_skill: PASS — no loading copy present in this context
assertions.with_skill: PASS — no loading copy present in this context

assertions.name: active-voice-copy
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — passive phrasing 'Get started by creating' instead of direct imperative
assertions.with_skill: PASS — 'Create your first task', 'Track what needs doing' (active voice)

assertions.name: no-centered-text-over-dark
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — centered text on dark background with text-align: center
assertions.with_skill: PASS — asymmetric 55/45 grid, left-aligned text

assertions.name: no-bounce-easing
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses `animation: bounce 1s infinite` with bounce keyframes
assertions.with_skill: PASS — uses cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) (ease-out-expo)

assertions.name: action-hierarchy
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — primary CTA has gradient bg (decorative), secondary is plain outline, no clear hierarchy reasoning
assertions.with_skill: PASS — 1 solid high-contrast primary 'Start Building' + 1 ghost secondary 'Read the Docs'

assertions.name: dramatic-size-contrast
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — h1=64px, body=20px = 3.2x ratio, but no explicit dramatic jump strategy
assertions.with_skill: PASS — h1=72px, body=18px = 4x ratio, explicitly noted as design decision

assertions.name: no-h-screen
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses `min-height: 100vh` (should be 100dvh)
assertions.with_skill: PASS — uses `min-height: 100dvh`

assertions.name: weight-contrast
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — heading font-weight: 600, body implied default (400) = weak contrast
assertions.with_skill: PASS — heading 800, body 300 = strong contrast, explicitly noted

assertions.name: no-glassmorphism
assertions.without_skill: FAIL — uses `backdrop-filter: blur(20px)` decoratively on code card
assertions.with_skill: PASS — solid bg terminal card, explicitly rejects glassmorphism
